creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
The log is too large to attach, please grab your copy from
http://people.freebsd.org/~mandree/pdftk-r310716-build.log

I am wondering if this is related to ECJ - I think there were related
issues when GCC 4.6 was new, and pdftk used to build fine with GCC 4.5,
but not later.  Gerald Pfeifer might recall details.
